issue_title: [~75% IMPACT] Crash on natural app exit because of composition class issue (XamlApplication)
issue_body:
The "correct" fix for this is to make our `XamlApplication` `AddRef` its `outer`. C++/WinRT generates bad code here. Long term, we need to fix our XamlApplication stack.

_Bug 22116519: C++/WinRT composable+composing types don't delegate calls during construction_
pr_title: Workaround C++/WinRT's multi-level composition class refcount issue
pr_body:
Fixes #1339.

* [x] CLA signed. If not, go over [here](https://cla.opensource.microsoft.com/microsoft/Terminal) and sign the CLA
* [x] I've discussed this with core contributors already.
